title: StarHUD
description: Display fancy HUDs in your game.
body:
A Minecraft mod that display HUDs in a more fancy way...

![Default HUD Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/40SFPJ0u/images/2e821d62d249bd79802615eec880ea80cf1566f3.png)

### Requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
<hr>

<details>
  <summary>Features</summary>
  
  <details>
  <summary>List of HUD</summary>
    
  - Armor Durability HUD
  - Coordinate & Nether Coordinate HUD
  - Direction and Horizontal Yaw HUD
  - Ping HUD
  - FPS HUD
  - System & In-Game Clock HUD (+ Weather Indicator)
  - Biome Indicator HUD (+ Dimension Indicator)
  - Inventory HUD (Disabled by default)
  - Hand Items Indicator HUD (Durability + Item Count)
  - Status Effect HUD
  - Day Counter HUD
  - Targetted Crosshair HUD
  - TPS HUD
  - Speed HUD
  - Combo HUD
  - Reach HUD
  - Player Count HUD
  - Inventory Space HUD
    
  </details>

  <details>
  <summary>Others</summary>
  
  - Drag and Drop HUD Placement
  - HUD Snapping
  - Automatic HUD Screen Alignment
  - Multiple HUD Display Mode (Icon, Info, or Both)
  - Customizable Data Collection Interval (For faster performance)
  - HUD Screen Alignment Placement
  - HUD Growing direction
  - Grouping System
  - Conditional Positioning
  
  </details>
  
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Configuring the HUD</summary>
  
  <details>
    <summary>Edit HUD Screen</summary>

  - Press **RIGHT SHIFT** to Open this screen.
  - Help (indicated by '?') will give you a list of keybinds.
  - More Options (indicated by '+') will give you advanced HUD positioning.
    ![Edit HUD Screen preview](https://i.imgur.com/SIyZMb8.png)
  - Press 'G' or Group / Ungroup HUDs.
  - Set the gap between each child element on group hud for spaced layout.
    ![Grouping Preview](https://imgur.com/q9ocZBm.gif)

  </details>
  
  <details>
    <summary>Configuration Screen</summary>
    
  - You need [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) To access the configuration screen.
  - Modify the General Setting to your liking.
  - add a Condition Rule if your HUD is being overlapped by Minecraft's HUDs.
  - Toggle HUD
    
  </details>
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Performance Concern</summary>

  Yes, this mod DOES reduce your FPS. Worst case, if EVERY HUD is rendered, you will have **60%** FPS loss.

  I highly recommend using [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) for faster HUD Performance (the HUD can be **1.5x** faster).
  
  <details>
    <summary>Worst to Best HUD Performance</summary>

  1. Inventory HUD (the more items the worse)
  2. Status Effect HUD (The more effects the worse)
  3. Targetted Crosshair HUD
  4. Durability HUD that uses item as it's icon
  5. The rest of the HUD
    
  </details>

  <details>
    <summary>Performance Tips</summary>

  - Combine Background on Group HUD (set Group Background: On)\
  ![Before](https://imgur.com/d0cQ48B.png)
  ![After](https://imgur.com/SKVRDKu.png)\
  (16 Draw Calls -> 3 Draw Calls)

  - Set "Icon to Info Gap": 0 or lower\
  ![Before](https://i.imgur.com/Zzl5qMl.png)
  ![After](https://i.imgur.com/rWQBzTN.png)\
  (4 Draw Calls -> 3 Draw Calls)

  - Set "Draw Background Rounded": False\
  ![Before](https://i.imgur.com/rWQBzTN.png)
  ![After](https://i.imgur.com/2J0H6Iz.png)\
  (3 Draw Calls -> 1 Draw Call)

  - Set a Condition for your HUD to only render in a specific condition, disabling them dynamically.

  - Disable any HUD you rarely / never used.

  </details>
</details>

For Support or Suggestion you may go to [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/bhXgum44H7) or [Github](https://github.com/Finsider/starhud).

<hr>

### CREDITS
[Color Hunt](https://colorhunt.co/palettes/pastel) and [Atom Material Icons](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/10044-atom-material-icons): Color Inspirations\
[MCC Island](https://mcchampionship.com/island) and [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com): HUD Inspirations\
[Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars) and [Simple HUD Enchanced](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-hud-enhanced): Status Effect HUD Inspiration\
[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) and [WTHIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit): Targetted Crosshair HUD Inspiration\
[MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud): TPS Tracking Implementation ([Code](https://github.com/maruohon/minihud/blob/5d2449886e26fba45646ea89f5a80f706d196e11/src/main/java/minihud/data/TpsDataManager.java#L70))
